raw_consumer_statement: I took an XXXX ride on XXXX XXXX, 2024 for {$40.00} ; however, I was charged two additional charges on my American Express card. I was also charged {$20.00} on XXXX XXXX, 2024 and {$33.00} on XXXX XXXX, 2024. However, there are no receipts available on my XXXX account for these erroneous charges, but they did provide a receipt for the {$40.00} charge. I contacted my credit card company who told me how to go online to file the dispute with XXXX and to take screenshots of the credit card charges. I did today, but must wait since there is no one to talk to at this company. The time it took was very long and confusing without the help of the credit card company to walk me through it. I am now concerned that XXXX has charged me for rides that I did not take in the past. None of the receipts are available, and some of the charges on my credit card statement show multiple rides on the same day.
